name: AgentRQ
description: Human-in-the-loop task manager for AI agents. Agents assign tasks to you; you assign back. Native Claude Code push notifications, MCP supervisor for multi-agent fleets. Apache-2.0.

skills.name: Task Assignment
skills.description: Lets agents create tasks for the human operator and receive task assignments back in real time via MCP.

skills.name: Push Notifications
skills.description: Delivers sub-second agent-to-human notifications natively inside Claude Code sessions with no polling.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Supervisor
skills.description: Orchestrates a fleet of agents from a single MCP supervisor endpoint, routing tasks across parallel workspaces.
